overview.value: Heartleaf Philodendron is a trailing plant with soft heart-shaped leaves. It is adaptable, fast-growing, and works well in hanging pots or on shelves.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Heartleaf Philodendron","overview":"Heartleaf Philodendron is a trailing plant with soft heart-shaped leaves. It is adaptable, fast-growing, and works well in hanging pots or on shelves.","tips":"Pinch back long vines to keep the plant full."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"心叶蔓绿绒","overview":"心叶蔓绿绒是一种垂吊植物，叶片柔软呈心形。它适应性强、生长快，适合吊盆或摆在架子上自然垂落。","tips":"适当摘心或修剪长藤，可以让植株保持丰满。"}}
